Index.title: Clinical ToolBox
Index.description:
Essential CRA/CRC calculations, schedules, and conversions in one place
Minimal input, clear results
Ready to export as PDF/Excel

Footer.disclaimer: This tool is for reference only and does not replace professional medical judgment. Please follow your protocol, IB, and institutional guidelines.

Compliance.title: Medication Compliance Calculator
Compliance.desc: Calculate drug compliance %, expected doses, and auto-flag discrepancies.

Schedule.title: Visit Window Schedule Generator
Schedule.desc: Generate protocol-specific visit windows and acceptable target dates.

Calculators.title: Clinical Calculators & Converters
Calculators.desc: Quickly convert units, calculate doses, infusion rates, eGFR, and more.

Feedback.title: Send Feedback
Feedback.footerDesc: Users from clinical sites worldwide are joining us.
Feedback.footerCallToAction: If there are features you want to add or improvements you'd like to suggest, please feel free to let us know. We build quickly!

About.title: About Clinical ToolBox
About.metaDesc: Learn about our mission to provide high-precision tools for clinical research professionals.
About.p1: As clinical research professionals, we spend a significant portion of our time doing repetitive manual calculations. Clinical ToolBox was built to eliminate these tedious tasks and reduce human error.
About.p2: Our goal is to provide a central place where CRAs and CRCs can quickly calculate adherence, generate visit schedules, and perform metric conversions with confidence.
About.p3: Every tool here is designed for speed and accuracy, allowing you to focus more on patient care and data quality rather than spreadsheets.
About.missionText: To be the most efficient digital companion for every CRA and CRC in the field.
About.reason1Desc: Calculators tailored specifically for protocol requirements like visit windows and missed doses.
About.reason2Desc: No patient data is ever stored on our servers. Everything happens in your browser.
About.reason3Desc: Export everything to PDF or Excel for your monitoring reports or site files.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.metaDesc: Review our privacy policy and data handling practices.
Privacy.introduction: We value your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your information.
Privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies to improve your user experience and for Google AdSense functionality.
Privacy.adsenseText1: Google AdSense uses cookies to serve relevant ads based on your site visits.
Privacy.adsenseText2: You can opt-out of personalized ads in your Google settings.
Privacy.dataHandlingText: We do not store the numbers you input into the calculators. All calculations are performed on your device.
Privacy.complianceText: We aim to follow GDPR and industry best practices for data privacy.

Guides.title: How to Use Clinical ToolBox
Guides.metaDesc: Learn how to use our medication compliance, visit schedule, and clinical calculators efficiently.

complianceGuide.title: How to Calculate Medication Compliance
complianceGuide.intro: Accurately calculating compliance is essential for drug accountability. Our tool handles the math for you.
complianceGuide.section1Text: Enter the Start Date and the Return Date. Then enter the Dispensed Quantity and Returned Quantity. The tool immediately calculates the estimated compliance based on the 'Daily Dose' you provide.
complianceGuide.section2Text: If a patient lost a bottle or missed doses due to side effects, use the 'Adjustments' tab. You can choose whether missed doses should be excused from the calculation or not with a single toggle.
complianceGuide.section3Text: Stop using manual spreadsheets. Get a clean, formatted result that you can export to PDF and attach to your monitoring report instantly.

scheduleGuide.title: How to Generate a Visit Schedule
scheduleGuide.intro: Quit counting days on a calendar. Generate a full, professional schedule in seconds.
scheduleGuide.section1Text: Simply enter 'Visit 1' (Baseline) date. Then add your subsequent visits (V2, V3, etc.) by specifying how many days after V1 they should occur.
scheduleGuide.section2Text: Enter the protocol-allowed window (e.g., ±3 days). The generator will automatically create a table showing the target date and the full acceptable range for every visit.
scheduleGuide.section3Text: Export the table to Excel and share it with your sites. This helps prevent 'Out of Window' deviations before they happen.

siteManagement.title: Using the Swiss-Army Clinical Calculator
siteManagement.text: Our multi-calculator tab features essential tools like renal function (eGFR/CrCl), BMI/BSA, and IV drip rates. Simply select the tab you need, enter the values, and get results instantly. It's designed to be your quick-reference companion during site visits.
